title: My Top 2 Dividend Stocks to Buy Now

title: 7 Quality Dividend Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: While the current market environment is full of uncertainty, these dividend stocks to buy offer a hedge against the rampant inflation rates. The post 7 Quality Dividend Stocks to Buy on the Dip appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Clorox Announces Appointment of Julia Denman and Stephanie Plaines to its Board of Directors
text: OAKLAND, Calif. , May 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) today announced the appointment of Julia (Charter) Denman and Stephanie Plaines to its board of directors, bringing additional deep financial expertise and industry leadership experience.

title: Brita Partners With Municipalities to Help Reduce Lead in Tap Water Without the Reliance on Single-Use Plastic Bottled Water
text: OAKLAND, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Brita®, the leader in at-home water filtration products for over 30 years, recently announced an expanded partnership program with municipalities across the United States. title: Is Clorox Stock a Buy?
text: The cleaning products giant is wrestling with higher costs of doing business.

title: Clorox's Declining Share Price Presents Opportunity For Income Seeking Investors
text: Shares of Clorox Company have drifted lower in recent months and that has created an opportunity for income-seeking investors. Our fair value estimate for Clorox sits at $157 per share, derived through our discounted free cash flow analysis process.

title: Makers of Dawn dish soap, Heinz ketchup, Clorox boost defenses against store brand rivals
text: The makers of brand-name products such as Tide detergent and Kraft Macaroni & Cheese are bolstering their defenses against store-brand rivals like Walmart Inc's Great Value products as shoppers' budgets start to show signs of strain due to persistent inflation.

title: Clorox (CLX) Q3 Earnings & Sales Beat on Solid Demand
text: Clorox (CLX) Q3 results gained from solid demand, pricing actions and cost savings efforts. However, the ongoing inflationary pressures led to lowered bottom line view for fiscal 2022.

title: Clorox May Be At Risk Of Cutting Its Dividend
text: Clorox is a highly profitable and well-managed company. This is underscored by consistently high margins, excellent working capital management, and return on invested capital. Due to inflationary pressures and pandemic-related excess capacities, the company's gross margin has fallen dramatically.

title: Clorox Cut Its Profits Outlook on Inflation Concerns
text: The company now expects to make $3.60 to $3.85-a-share for the year, or $4.05 to $4.30-a-share on an adjusted basis.

title: The Clorox Company (CLX) CEO Linda Rendle on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 2, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Lisah Burhan - Vice President, Investor Relations Linda Rendle - Chief Executive Officer Kevin Jacobsen - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Dara Mohsenian - Morgan Stanley Andrea Teixeira - JPMorgan Peter Grom - UBS Chris Carey - Wells Fargo Kaumil Gajrawala - Credit Suisse Jason English - Goldman Sachs Kevin Grundy - Jefferies Steve Powers - Deutsche Bank Lauren Lieberman - Barclays Operator Good day, ladies and gentlemen and welcome to The Clorox Company Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 Earnings Release Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] As a reminder, this call is being recorded.

title: Clorox (CLX) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Clorox (CLX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 35.05% and 0.04%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Why Clorox Shares Are Sliding After Hours
text: Clorox Co (NYSE: CLX) shares are trading lower in Monday's after-hours session after the company reported financial results and cut its full-year earnings forecast. Clorox said fiscal third-quarter revenue increased 2% year-over-year to $1.8 billion, which was in line with analyst estimates.

title: Clorox annual earnings forecast trimmed as inflation takes a bite
text: Clorox Co. swung to a quarterly profit and reported stronger-than-expected 2% sales growth in the March quarter, but cut profit projections for the year, citing commodity and manufacturing and logistics costs.

title: Clorox Reports Q3 Fiscal Year 2022 Results, Updates Outlook
text: OAKLAND, Calif. , May 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) today reported results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2022, which ended March 31, 2022.
